versions.summary: Self-update in-app prompts and a detailed Changelog dialog are now live, alongside optimized, decoupled terminal rendering logic.
Characters missing from your chosen terminal font now fall back to the bundled JetBrains Mono instead of a thinner, mismatched system face.
Esc now closes the Settings panel in two deliberate steps, and the sandbox grants the Antigravity agent access to ~/.gemini.
Save files straight from the built-in editor with a dirty-state indicator, use the new Antigravity CLI, and open plain shell tabs alongside your agents.
